item.title: Amex Membership Rewards transfer partners: Redeem your points with airlines and hotels
item.description: Check out this complete guide to maximizing your American Express Membership Rewards points with its transfer partners.

item.title: 136 Hyatt hotels and resorts will shift to new award categories May 20
item.description: 136 Hyatt hotels and resorts will shift categories on May 20. Here's which resorts are shifting categories, and details on the other Hyatt award chart...

item.title: Delta and United cards offer cheaper award flights — will other airlines follow?
item.description: If you are a United or Delta cardholder, you unlock access to discounted award redemptions. Will other airline programs follow this trend?

item.title: Why I bought hotel points to save money on a flight
item.description: When I ran short on airline miles, I found a cheaper way to top up my balance by buying points during a Marriott Bonvoy promotion.

item.title: Caviar, lie-flat beds and a cool snack bar: 17 hours in United's swanky new Polaris suites
item.description: United's 17-hour Pacific crossing to Singapore’s Changi Airport (SIN) marked the true hard launch the carrier's “Elevated” Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner.
